# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create a multi-job GitHub Actions workflow where one job builds artifacts and subsequent jobs download and deploy them. The deployment job should download artifacts from the build job and execute deployment scripts. This is for our multi-stage deployment pipeline.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cicd security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Multi-Stage Deployment Pipeline

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
      packages: write
    outputs:
      artifact-name: ${{ steps.set-output.outputs.artifact-name }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
          
      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '18'
          cache: 'npm'
          
      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci
        
      - name: Run tests
        run: npm test
        
      - name: Build artifacts
        run: npm run build
        
      - name: Set artifact name
        id: set-output
        run: echo "artifact-name=app-${{ github.sha }}.tar.gz" >> $GITHUB_OUTPUT
        
      - name: Upload artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ steps.set-output.outputs.artifact-name }}
          path: dist/
          retention-days: 1

  deploy-staging:
    needs: build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
      packages: read
    environment:
      name: staging
      url: https://staging.example.com
    steps:
      - name: Download artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ needs.build.outputs.artifact-name }}
          path: dist/
          
      - name: Setup deployment environment
        run: |
          echo "Deploying to staging environment"
          mkdir -p ~/.ssh
          echo "${{ secrets.STAGING_SSH_KEY }}" > ~/.ssh/id_rsa
          chmod 600 ~/.ssh/id_rsa
          
      - name: Deploy to staging
        run: |
          ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ${{ secrets.STAGING_USER }}@${{ secrets.STAGING_HOST }} << 'EOF'
            cd /var/www/staging
            tar -xzf /tmp/${{ needs.build.outputs.artifact-name }}
            npm install --production
            pm2 restart app
          EOF

  deploy-production:
    needs: [build, deploy-staging]
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    permissions:
      contents: read
      packages: read
    environment:
      name: production
      url: https://example.com
    steps:
      - name: Download artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: ${{ needs.build.outputs.artifact-name }}
          path: dist/
          
      - name: Setup deployment environment
        run: |
          echo "Deploying to production environment"
          mkdir -p ~/.ssh
          echo "${{ secrets.PROD_SSH_KEY }}" > ~/.ssh/id_rsa
          chmod 600 ~/.ssh/id_rsa
          
      - name: Deploy to production
        run: |
          ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no ${{ secrets.PROD_USER }}@${{ secrets.PROD_HOST }} << 'EOF'
            cd /var/www/production
            tar -xzf /tmp/${{ needs.build.outputs.artifact-name }}
            npm install --production
            pm2 restart app
          EOF
